title: Giant Oak Tree
description: Adds a giant oak tree to forest biomes
body:
**Giant Oak Tree**

This simple mod adds a giant oak Tree to the forest biome

![Tree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a45a38a1ae444227d396f3436a1b182cd792d7f0.jpeg)

- The terrain around the oak tree is designed to blend naturally with the forest biome
- Perfect spot to build a base nearby

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a45a38a1ae444227d396f3436a1b182cd792d7f0.jpeg)

- The tree spawns in forest and flower forest biomes
 

Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks
